basic_details.job_title: DMHO Jogulamba Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Lab Technician & STLS Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Medical and Health Office Jogulamba (DMHO Jogulamba)
basic_details.short_information: District Medical and Health Office Jogulamba (DMHO Jogulamba) Lab Technician & STLS Notification 2026 has been released on the official website gadwal.telangana.gov.in. A total of 5 vacancies for Lab Technician and Senior Tuberculosis Laboratory Supervisor (STLS) have been announced through the DMHO Jogulamba Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 44 years Age Relaxation: SCs, STs, BCs & EWS: 5 years; Ex-service men: 3 years; NCC (Instructor): 3 years; Physically challenged: 10 years

qualification.education_qualification: Intermediate with Biology and Physics, DMLT or B.SC(MLT) from recognized institutions, registered with Telangana Para Medical Board, B.Sc(MLT) or DMLT from recognized university, Permanent two wheeler driving license, Certificate course in computer operations (minimum 2 months)
qualification.details: Lab Technician: Intermediate with Biology and Physics, DMLT or B.SC(MLT) from recognized institutions, Must be registered with the Telangana Para Medical Board. Senior Tuberculosis Laboratory Supervisor (STLS): Graduate degree in Science (BSC) Medical laboratory Technology (MLT) or a Diploma in Medical laboratory Technology (DMLT) from a recognized university/Institution, Permanent two wheeler driving license, Certificate course in computer operations (minimum 2 months).

salary_details.details: Lab Technician: Rs. 27,300/- per month Senior Tuberculosis Laboratory Supervisor (STLS): Rs. 22,100/- per month

selection_process: Merit List (90 marks qualifying exam + 10 marks age weightage) Rule of Reservation (RoR) and Presidential Orders
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DMHO Jogulamba Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://gadwal.telangana.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download DMHO Jogulamba Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.district_medical_and_health_office_jogul: Intermediate with Biology and Physics, DMLT or B.SC(MLT) from recognized institutions, registered with Telangana Para Medical Board, B.Sc(MLT) or DMLT from recognized university, Permanent two wheeler driving license, Certificate course in computer operations (minimum 2 months)

content_sections.heading: DMHO Jogulamba Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DMHO Jogulamba Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download DMHO Jogulamba Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: DMHO Jogulamba Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Lab Technician: Intermediate with Biology and Physics, DMLT or B.SC(MLT) from recognized institutions, Must be registered with the Telangana Para Medical Board. Senior Tuberculosis Laboratory Supervisor (STLS): Graduate degree in Science (BSC) Medical laboratory Technology (MLT) or a Diploma in Medical laboratory Technology (DMLT) from a recognized university/Institution, Permanent two wheeler driving license, Certificate course in computer operations (minimum 2 months).

content_sections.heading: DMHO Jogulamba Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 44 years Age Relaxation: SCs, STs, BCs & EWS: 5 years; Ex-service men: 3 years; NCC (Instructor): 3 years; Physically challenged: 10 years

content_sections.heading: DMHO Jogulamba Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Lab Technician: Rs. 27,300/- per month Senior Tuberculosis Laboratory Supervisor (STLS): Rs. 22,100/- per month

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Applications

content_sections.heading: DMHO Jogulamba Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Merit List (90 marks qualifying exam + 10 marks age weightage) Rule of Reservation (RoR) and Presidential Orders

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DMHO Jogulamba Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://gadwal.telangana.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for DMHO Jogulamba Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for DMHO Jogulamba Recruitment 2026 is 17th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Lab Technician & STLS posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for the Lab Technician and STLS positions under the DMHO Jogulamba Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Lab Technician?
faq.answer: For the Lab Technician post, candidates need to have completed Intermediate with Biology and Physics, and possess a DMLT or B.SC(MLT) from recognized institutions, along with registration with the Telangana Para Medical Board.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for all posts is between a minimum of 18 years and a maximum of 44 years, with applicable age relaxations for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the STLS post?
faq.answer: The Senior Tuberculosis Laboratory Supervisor (STLS) post offers a monthly salary of Rs. 22,100/-.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for SC/ST candidates applying for the DMHO Jogulamba Recruitment 2026. The fee is applicable only for General/OBC categories.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for DMHO Jogulamba Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a Merit List, which considers qualifying exam marks and age weightage, followed by the Rule of Reservation (RoR) and Presidential Orders.

faq.question: Q8. How can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Medical and Health Office Jogulamba, which is https://gadwal.telangana.gov.in.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents, including a photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant educational and professional certificates.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Lab Technician and STLS under DMHO Jogulamba Recruitment 2026 are on a contract basis.
